title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data to enable robots to understand and predict physical environments. Cosmos 3 forms the perceptual foundation of NVIDIA's integrated physical AI stack alongside Vera and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot.
